name: Abhishek Joshi
summary: Abhishek shares his TGC (Technical Graduate Course) journey and tips for answering core engineering questions in the personal interview.
data: TGC entry is for engineering graduates. I applied during my final year of Mechanical Engineering. My SSB was at Bangalore. The interview was technical, covering heat transfer, solid mechanics, and fluid dynamics, as well as coding questions. I kept my answers structured and logical. In GTO, I utilized mechanical leverage principles to solve bridge building tasks, which the GTO appreciated. The key is to demonstrate analytical ability and sound problem-solving skills under stress.
